different designations are given to the eclipses. Savya means the
southern side of tbe disc, while Apasavya means the northern side»
In the case of a lunar eclipse south-east is called^apya, while north-
east Apasavya. In the case of the solar eclipse these are respectively
north-west and south-west. Leha means * licking with the tongue'.
Grasana Tatans_swallowing. Nirodha is blocking. Avamardana is com-
plete crushing. Arohana is remounting. Aghrdta is smelt. The other two
terms are self-explanatory.]

When the shadow (Raha) is on the southern side of the solar
or lunar orb ^t an eclipse, the world will be inundated by floods,
but people will be happy and free from fear. If the eclipse occurs
on the northern side, people will perish as a result of the tyranny
of kings and depredations of robbers.
